tools.name: investigate_incident
tools.description: Run a complete root cause analysis for an incident in a single call. Returns the incident details, all recent deployments (24h), change log entries (24h), and known issues aggregated. PREFERRED over calling get_incident, get_deployment_history, get_change_log, and get_known_issues separately.

incidentId.description: The incident ID to investigate (e.g. INC-2026-042)

tools.name: get_incident
tools.description: Get full details of a specific incident by its ID, including status, severity, timeline, and affected services

tools.name: get_change_log
tools.description: Get the change log of infrastructure and configuration changes, optionally filtered by time range or service

tools.name: get_known_issues
tools.description: Get a list of known issues and open bugs that may be contributing to an incident

status.description: Filter by status: open, investigating, resolved

tools.name: get_deployment_history
tools.description: Get recent deployment history, optionally filtered by service or time window
